listening.title: Listening: Frequency survey
listening.transcript: I usually exercise three times a week. I always wake up at six o'clock. I sometimes go to the cinema, maybe once a month.

questions.question: Exercise frequency: ___ times a week
questions.explanation: "I usually exercise three times a week."

listening.title: Listening: Scheduling a meeting
listening.transcript: The meeting is on a weekday, on Tuesday afternoon. I am busy in the morning, so let's meet at three o'clock.

questions.question: When is the meeting?
questions.explanation: "The meeting is on a weekday, on Tuesday afternoon."
